title: Sonnet 5 (Fully Tested): IT UNDERPERFORMS GLM-5.2 and COSTS MORE!?
summary: AICodeKing reviews Claude Sonnet 5, finding it underperforms Claude Opus 4.8 and GLM-5.2 while costing more. Testing reveals weak performance on coding tasks, strange behavior in IDE integrations, and benchmark results lagging Opus across most metrics. The reviewer concludes Sonnet 5 is overpriced and underwhelming compared to alternatives.
writeup: AICodeKing tests Claude Sonnet 5 across coding tasks, IDE integrations, and benchmarks, and concludes it underperforms both Claude Opus 4.8 and GLM-5.2 while costing more. The review reports weak coding results, unusual behavior inside IDE integrations, and benchmark scores that trail Opus on most metrics. The takeaway is that Sonnet 5 is overpriced and underwhelming relative to the available alternatives.
